title: Correlation Context
description: Common v1 correlation context for flows that cross packs, systems, APIs, workers, or events.
$comment: Source: MASTER-03 requires correlation for multi-pack flows and docs/correlation-audit-standard.md recommends correlation id, causation id, actor, source system, and timestamp when end-to-end traceability is needed.

correlationId.description: Identifier connecting steps in the same flow. It does not replace business IDs.

causationId.description: Optional identifier of the request, command, event, or decision that caused this item.

sourceSystem.description: System that emitted or handled the item.

timestamp.description: Time the correlation context was attached.
